The LQ Flagship '''''Havelon''''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] that served as [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] above the planet [[Despayre]], while the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] was undergoing completion. It was aboard ''Havelon'' that Tarkin received [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for his inspection of the station's progress.

==Behind the scenes==
LQ is a naval designation for drafting services, which in that context relates to hull construction. It's possible this designates Tarkin's vessel as the flagship for the Imperial Navy's spaceborne building efforts, in this case, the Death Star battlestation.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
